    def eligible_for_pension_support(self) -> bool:
        # Check age requirement
        age_eligible = self.age >= 60
        
        # Check years of service requirement
        service_eligible = self.years_of_service >= 40
        
        # Check employment status requirement
        employment_eligible = self.employment_status == 'retired'
        
        # Applicant is eligible if all conditions are met
        return age_eligible and service_eligible and employment_eligible
